'''Rappapor''' was a member of [[Samuel Tomas Gillespee|Gillespee's]] smuggler group.

==History==
Rappapor was taught the art of smuggling by his father, who was also a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]. He and [[Shirlee Faughn|Faughn]] helped Gillespee escape from [[Ukio/Legends|Ukio]] just before [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] forces moved in to take over. The [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] was also present at the meeting in which [[Talon Karrde]] presented his plans to steal the [[crystal gravfield trap]] from [[Bilbringi system/Legends|Bilbringi]].<ref name="TTS" />

==Personality and traits==
Rappapor was a moderately talented pilot and con artist. He liked to haggle and pull practical jokes, usually on Gillespee. He was not as intellectually inclined as most Bith, and this lead him to be an outcast in their society.<ref name="TTS" />

==Equipment==
He often wore baggy red trousers, a black tunic, and a white flight vest. He would carry a [[Heavy blaster pistol/Legends|heavy blaster pistol]].<ref name="TTS" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last Command]]'' {{Ab|The Last Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
